title: canna indica var. lutea
intro: Canna indica var. lutea, also known as the Yellow Canna, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Cannaceae and is native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Canna indica var. lutea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine practices.
